config.enable_rotation_desc: 启用/禁用自动循环执行
config.preset_tooltip: 为不同游戏内容选择预设配置
config.reset_question: 确定要重置为默认设置吗？
config.apply_preset_confirmation: 应用预设将覆盖当前设置。是否继续？
config.overwrite_warning: 这将覆盖你当前的设置。
config.general.movement_tolerance_desc: How long to wait after movement stops before casting (seconds).
config.general.start_on_auto_attack_desc: When enabled, Daedalus starts executing the rotation as soon as auto-attack is active on a target, before the server sets the in-combat flag.
config.window.prevent_escape_close_desc: When enabled, pressing Escape will not close the Daedalus window.
config.window.show_during_cutscenes_desc: When enabled, Daedalus windows stay visible during in-game cutscenes.
config.overlay.show_mechanics_forecast_d: Displays upcoming fight mechanics (raidwides, tank busters, phases) with countdown timers in the overlay. Only visible when a fight timeline is loaded.
config.targeting.strategy_desc.lowest_hp: Target enemy with lowest HP (finish off weak enemies)
config.targeting.strategy_desc.highest_h: Target enemy with highest HP (for cleave/AoE)
config.targeting.strategy_desc.tank_assi: Attack what the party tank is targeting
config.targeting.strategy_desc.current_t: Use your current hard target if valid
config.targeting.strategy_desc.focus_tar: Use your focus target if valid
config.targeting.fallback_to_lowest_hp_d: If no tank target found, use Lowest HP instead.
config.targeting.movement_tolerance_desc: Delay after stopping before casting. Lower = faster, higher = safer.
config.role_actions.enable_esuna_desc: Automatically cleanse dispellable debuffs from party.
config.role_actions.enable_rescue_desc: Pulls party member to your position. Manual use only.
config.role_actions.rescue_warning: WARNING: Rescue can kill party members if misused!
config.resurrection.raise_mode_desc_bala: Raise in weave windows, don't interrupt healing
config.resurrection.raise_mode_desc_heal: Only raise when party HP is stable
config.resurrection.allow_hardcast_desc: Cast Raise without Swiftcast (8s cast). Use with caution.
config.resurrection.min_mp_for_raise_des: Minimum MP percentage before attempting to raise.
config.privacy.telemetry_desc: Only sends plugin version. No personal data.
config.damage.safe_to_attack_desc: Party HP threshold above which damage spells are used.
config.job.whm.cure_iii_desc: Targeted AoE heal (10y radius around target). Best when stacked.
config.job.whm.lily_heals_desc: Free heals that consume Lily gauge.
config.job.whm.ogcd_heals_desc: Instant heals used during weave windows.
config.job.whm.buffs_desc: Speed buff and MP cost reduction.
config.job.whm.aetherial_shift_desc: Gap closer (15y dash) when out of spell range.
config.job.whm.use_damage_based_triage_d: Prioritize healing targets taking active damage.
config.job.whm.enable_assize_for_healing: Use Assize as a healing oGCD when party needs it.
config.job.whm.enable_preemptive_healing: Heal before damage spikes land based on pattern detection.
config.job.whm.enable_timeline_predictio: Use fight timelines for precise mechanic timing.
config.job.whm.enable_scored_heal_select: Use multi-factor scoring instead of tier-based selection.
config.job.whm.shields_desc: Single-target shields. Applied to tank when HP < 90%.
config.job.whm.party_mitigation_desc: Party-wide mitigation. Used when 3+ injured or avg HP low.
config.job.whm.bell_and_caress_desc: Bell: Ground AoE reactive heal. Caress: AoE shield after Temperance.
config.job.whm.use_with_aoe_heals_desc: Sync Plenary Indulgence with AoE healing for bonus potency.
config.job.whm.holy_desc: Self-centered AoE (8y radius). Use when enemies are stacked.
config.job.whm.misery_desc: 1240p AoE damage (costs 3 Blood Lilies). Use at 3 stacks.
config.job.sch.recitation_target_desc: Which ability to use with Recitation (guaranteed crit, free).
config.job.sch.excogitation_desc: Apply Excogitation proactively at this HP%.
config.job.sch.auto_summon_fairy_desc: Automatically summon Eos if not present.
config.job.sch.enable_fairy_abilities_de: Automatically use Whispering Dawn, Fey Blessing, etc.
config.job.sch.avoid_sage_shields_desc: Don't apply Galvanize if target has Sage shields.
config.job.sch.stack_reserve_desc: Stacks to keep for emergency healing.
config.job.sch.dump_window_desc: Start dumping stacks when Aetherflow CD is below this.
config.job.sch.max_fairy_gauge_desc: Only use when gauge is below this (avoid waste).
config.job.sch.safe_party_hp_desc: Only use when party HP is above this.
config.job.sch.aetherflow_desc: Use Aetherflow when stacks are empty.
config.job.sch.chain_stratagem_desc: 目标受到的暴击率提升
config.job.sch.baneful_impaction_desc: AoE follow-up when Impact Imminent is active.
config.job.ast.essential_dignity_desc: 能力技单体治疗，低HP时更强
config.job.ast.essential_dignity_thresho: Lower = more healing potency (scales with missing HP).
config.job.ast.aoe_min_targets_desc: Minimum party members below threshold for AoE heals.
config.job.ast.earthly_star_desc: 放置后成熟可引爆治疗
config.job.ast.detonate_threshold_desc: Party average HP to trigger detonation.
config.job.ast.wait_for_giant_dominance_: Wait 10s for star to mature before detonating.
config.job.ast.emergency_threshold_desc: Detonate immature star if HP drops below this.
config.job.ast.macrocosmos_threshold_des: Use when party average HP is below this.
config.job.ast.lady_of_crowns_threshold_: HP threshold to use Lady of Crowns heal.
config.job.ast.astrodyne_min_seals_desc: Wait for this many unique seals (more seals = better buffs).
config.job.ast.lightspeed_save_for_raise: Save for raising dead party members
config.job.ast.dot_refresh_threshold_des: Refresh DoT when this many seconds remain.
config.job.ast.collective_unconscious_wa: Channeled ability - may interrupt other actions.
config.job.sge.auto_apply_kardia_desc: Automatically place Kardia on a party member.
config.job.sge.enable_kardia_swapping_de: Allow swapping Kardia target during combat.
config.job.sge.swap_threshold_desc: Swap to target below this HP if current target is above it.
config.job.sge.soteria_threshold_desc: Kardia target HP to trigger Soteria.
config.job.sge.stack_reserve_desc: Stacks to keep for emergency healing.
config.job.sge.prevent_addersgall_cap_de: Spend stacks proactively to avoid capping.
config.job.sge.cap_prevention_window_des: Start spending when new stack would be granted within this time.
config.job.sge.rhizomata_min_free_slots_: Only use when this many slots are free.
config.job.sge.physis_ii_desc: Free AoE HoT + healing received buff.
config.job.sge.pepsis_threshold_desc: Converts shields to healing when party HP drops below this.
config.job.sge.haima_threshold_desc: Apply to tank when HP below this.
config.job.sge.panhaima_threshold_desc: Use when party average HP below this.
config.job.sge.avoid_overwriting_shields: Don't apply new shields over existing ones.
config.job.sge.krasis_threshold_desc: Apply when target HP below this.
config.job.sge.philosophia_threshold_des: Use when party average HP below this.
config.job.sge.dosis_desc: Casted single-target damage. Triggers Kardia healing.
config.job.tank.shared_description: These settings apply to all tank jobs.
config.job.tank.mitigation_threshold_des: Use mitigation when HP drops below this %.
config.job.tank.use_rampart_on_cooldown_: If disabled, saves major cooldowns for tank busters.
config.job.tank.sheltron_min_gauge_desc: Minimum gauge for Sheltron/TBN/Heart of Stone/etc.
config.job.tank.auto_tank_stance_desc: Enable tank stance when entering combat.
config.job.tank.provoke_delay_desc: Delay before Provoking (prevents accidental provokes during swaps).
config.job.tank.auto_shirk_desc: Shirk to co-tank after tank swap.
config.job.pld.detailed_settings_warning: 详细骑士设置将在未来更新中添加。

config.job.pld.clemency_warning: 深仁厚泽设置将在未来更新中添加。
config.job.war.beast_gauge_desc: 原初的直感/血涤使用通用坦克量表设置。
config.job.war.detailed_settings_warning: 详细战士设置将在未来更新中添加。

analytics.tip_movement: 尝试减少移动导致的空转

training.enable_training_mode_tooltip: 启用实时决策解释和技能追踪
training.show_coaching_hints_tooltip: 战斗中为困难概念显示上下文提示
training.personality_tooltip: 选择指导消息的语气和风格
training.skill_level_tooltip: 基于测验表现和课程进度
training.adaptive_tooltip_format:
当前等级: {0}
详细程度: {1}
training.based_on_both: 基于战斗表现和掌握度数据:
training.clear_dismissed_tooltip: 再次显示已忽略的推荐。
training.enable_recommendations_tooltip: 启用后，将根据战斗表现问题建议课程。
training.enable_above: 启用上方功能以获得个性化课程建议。
training.complete_for_recs: 完成战斗以获得基于表现的课程建议，或使用下方的掌握度数据生成建议。
training.recs_tip: 提示：推荐基于战斗后检测到的问题或困难概念生成。
training.generate_tooltip: 根据该职业的困难概念生成课程推荐。
training.complete_tooltip: 将此课程标记为完成并从推荐中移除。
training.dismiss_tooltip: 忽略此推荐。点击「清除已忽略」可再次显示。
training.complete_prerequisites: 请完成前置课程以解锁此内容。
training.mark_incomplete_tooltip: 移除此课程的完成状态
training.mark_complete_tooltip: 将此课程标记为完成。所有概念也将被标记为已学习。
training.quiz_instructions: 完成测验以测试每节课的理解程度。5题中答对4题即为通过。
training.question: 问题:
training.answer_all_first: 请先回答所有问题再提交。
training.adaptive_verbosity_tooltip:
启用后，解释详细程度将根据你的技能等级自动调整：
- 初学者：所有决策的详细解释
- 中级：正常详细程度，不熟悉的概念有额外解释
- 高级：最少细节，仅新增或重要决策有详细说明
training.skill_override_tooltip:
覆盖检测到的技能等级：
- 自动检测：从测验和课程进度确定等级
- 初学者/中级/高级：强制特定等级
training.focus_areas_format: ⚠ 重点领域（{0} 个概念需要练习）
training.open_lesson_tooltip: 打开涵盖此概念的课程
training.play_to_build_mastery: 启用训练模式并进行游戏以构建掌握度数据。
training.enable_adaptive_to_see_skills: 启用上方的自适应解释以查看技能等级。
training.no_progress_yet: 暂无进度。完成课程和测验以查看技能等级。
training.other_jobs_no_progress: 其他 {0} 个职业暂无进度。
training.quiz_quality_tooltip: 通过的测验的平均分数
training.concept_mastery_tooltip: 战斗中应用概念的成功率
training.engagement_penalty: 注意：-25% 惩罚已应用（完成课程但未参加测验）
training.engagement_penalty_tooltip: 参加测验以验证你的理解并移除此惩罚。
training.developing_format: 发展中: {0} 个概念（需要练习）
training.developing_tooltip: 这些概念需要至少10次机会才能评估掌握度。
training.play_more_to_build_mastery: 继续游戏以构建掌握度数据！
training.retention_tooltip:
追踪概念随时间的记忆程度。
不练习的概念会衰减 - 当保持率降至40%以下时会建议复习。
training.last_practiced_tooltip:
上次练习: {0} 天前
打开课程以刷新知识。
training.retention_declining_tooltip:
保持率下降中。
建议复习以保持知识。
